meaning: n.亚里斯多德(古希腊大哲学家,科学家)
examples: Aristotle was valued because of his clear exposition of rational thought.
All thinkers, to some degree, have read Aristotle through their own lenses.
For example, Aristotle once had a research library in the third century B.C..
In fact, according to Aristotle, return on capital was a violation of the nature of things.
As Aristotle said, friendship is a relationship in which people come to share the same soul.
